title: Message forwarding → relay token mismatch → 401
evidence: All 8 TC-031 tests passed in 1656ms (430/430 suite total): - Wrong X-Relay-Token → 401 `{ok: false, error: 'Unauthorized'}` - Missing X-Relay-Token → 401 `{ok: false, error: 'Unauthorized'}` - No MESSAGE_DELIVERED audit event for rejected messages - Correct relay token (with mocked fetch) → 200 `{ok: true}` - MESSAGE_DELIVERED audit event written with correct slackEventId
